source_notes: Secondary rural sweep of GA/FL/VA/TX focus areas. Sources: VAPGA dealer directory, GA/FL/TX Propane Gas Association listings, county-level BBB/Yellow Pages, farm coops, state corporation commission registrations. Deduped against existing normalized list.
